Admissions

Join Our Academic Community - Admissions Open for 2024-25

Admissions Currently Closed

Eligibility Criteria

Age and academic requirements for admission

Class V

Completion of Class IV or equivalent

Class VI-VIII

Previous class pass certificate

Class IX

Madhyamik pass certificate with minimum 40%

Class XI

Madhyamik (Class X) pass certificate from recognized board

Required Documents

Please prepare these documents for admission

Birth Certificate (Original & Photocopy)
Previous Class Mark Sheet and Pass Certificate
Transfer Certificate from previous school
Caste Certificate (if applicable)
Aadhaar Card (Student & Parent)
4 Recent Passport Size Photographs
Income Certificate (for fee concession)
Bank Account Details

Admission Process

Follow these simple steps to complete your admission

1

Collect Admission Form

Visit school office or download the form online during admission period

2

Fill Application Form

Complete the form with accurate information and attach required documents

3

Submit Form

Submit the completed form along with all documents at the school office

4

Document Verification

School will verify all submitted documents and eligibility criteria

5

Admission Confirmation

Receive admission confirmation and complete fee payment

Important Dates

Mark your calendar with these crucial dates

Admission Notice Release

January 15, 2024

Form Submission Start

January 20, 2024

Form Submission End

February 28, 2024

Merit List Publication

March 5, 2024

Admission Process

March 10-20, 2024

Classes Commence

April 1, 2024

Download Admission Form

Get the official admission form and start your journey with us

Admission Guidelines

  • Admission is subject to availability of seats and verification of documents
  • All information provided in the application form must be accurate and truthful
  • Parents must visit the school office in person for final admission
  • Fee structure will be provided at the time of admission
  • School uniform and books can be purchased from authorized vendors
